hero.titolo: Bright and welcoming in the heart of Cesena
hero.sottotitolo: A modern, thoughtfully designed apartment steps away from shops, restaurants and historic landmarks. Fast WiFi, fully equipped kitchen, self check-in.

appartamento.sottotitolo: Every detail designed for your comfort

esperienza.sottotitolo: From the door of Garibaldina 75, the city is at your fingertips

cards.testo: The Malatestiana Fortress dominates the skyline. Museums, churches and the medieval historic centre are all walkable from the apartment.
Piadina, cappelletti, wines from the Cesena hills. Restaurants and trattorias a short walk away for an authentic Romagna dining experience.
Reach the Cesenatico coast in 30 minutes. Rimini in 40. San Marino in 35. A perfect starting point to explore all of Romagna.

comeFunziona.sottotitolo: Four steps and you are in Cesena

steps.testo: Browse available dates on Airbnb and choose when you want to stay.
Book in a few clicks with secure payment through the Airbnb platform.
Before arrival you will receive full instructions and the smart lock code by message.
Let yourself in independently, at any time. The apartment will be ready and waiting.

posizione.descrizione: Garibaldina 75 sits in the heart of Cesena historic centre, on one of the city main avenues. Everything is walkable: the Malatestiana Fortress, the market, the best restaurants and city centre shops.

host.bio: We are Lucea Collection, a team passionate about hospitality based in Romagna. We take care of every apartment down to the last detail to ensure an authentic and comfortable stay. We are always available for tips, local recommendations and any needs during your visit.

finalCta.titolo: Ready for your stay in Cesena?
finalCta.sottotitolo: Check availability and book directly on Airbnb.
